name: Lebanese Tabbouleh
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Finely chopped ripe tomatoes (if not ripe, omit)
1 1/2 cups Fresh spearmint leaves (finely chopped) - (if necessary, substitute another mint)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the cracked wheat several times and cover with water by 1/2-inch. Let soak for 20 minutes, then drain well, squeezing out excess water.
2. Combine minced onion with the allspice, pepper, and salt. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine the parsley, scallions, tomatoes, and mint. Gently fold in the drained wheat. Refrigerate until about an hour before serving.
4. Just before serving, stir in the seasoned onion. Dress with lemon juice and oil to taste.
